burdenOfProof: Beyond Reasonable Doubt (95%+) — EXCEEDED for Tier A parties
executiveSummary: This report details systematic tax fraud, fraudulent SARS submissions, and related financial crimes committed by the Tier A conspirators. The total quantum of fraudulent tax submissions exceeds R10.2M across multiple tax years and entities.

suspects.name: Rynette Farrar

suspects.name: Daniel Jacobus Bantjies

taxViolations.evidence: Fabricated 2019 financials, De Novo instruction emails
Misallocated R1,035,000 debt, incorrect expense allocations
Villa Via rent inflation (86% profit margin), personal expense dumping

requestForAction: Initiate criminal prosecution for tax evasion under s235 of the Tax Administration Act.
Order forensic audit of all SARS submissions by the affected entities.
Issue preservation order for all financial records and accounting systems.
Refer to Asset Forfeiture Unit for recovery of proceeds of crime.
